actualOutcome: Successfully recovered Pane project after deletion bug. Created TypeScript development environment using hybrid approach: pre-compiled backend (main.mjs/preload.mjs with fixed deletion bug) + TypeScript React frontend with React Ace editor. Electron app running successfully.

data.description: Compiled main.mjs has CommonJS shims that conflict with ESM build
data.root_cause: Pre-compiled main.mjs has CommonJS compatibility shims, electron-vite tries to re-process it causing conflicts

data.description: electron-vite still processing copied main.js despite configuration
data.issue: electron-vite finds the copied index.js and tries to transpile it
data.solution_needed: Remove src/main/index.ts and src/preload/index.ts or configure electron-vite to skip them entirely

data.description: Successfully rebuilt Pane with TypeScript dev environment after deletion bug
data.approach: Hybrid: empty TypeScript placeholders for electron-vite, pre-compiled main.mjs/preload.mjs copied by script, React Ace editor, Electron IPC bridge
data.fixes: Replaced CodeMirror with React Ace, adapted Tauri commands to Electron IPC, bypassed ESM/CommonJS conflicts

data.summary: Successfully recovered Pane project after deletion bug. Created TypeScript development environment using hybrid approach: pre-compiled backend (main.mjs/preload.mjs with fixed deletion bug) + TypeScript React frontend with React Ace editor. Electron app running successfully.
